response:
<<Microsoft Digital Ethics>>
Section 1
Microsoft values trust deeply.
Trust guides every action.
Every action needs care.
Care ensures safe systems.
Safe systems protect users.
Users deserve fair treatment.
Fair treatment builds confidence.
Confidence grows with transparency.
Transparency shows our goals.
Our goals include fairness.
Section 2
Fairness avoids bias types.
Bias types harm people.
People need equal access.
Equal access means opportunity.
Opportunity should be broad.
Broad reach helps all.
All groups matter much.
Much effort goes in.
In code we check.
Check results for errors.
Section 3
Errors cause real harm.
Harm must be prevented.
Prevented issues save lives.
Lives are precious gifts.
Gifts require responsible use.
Use implies clear rules.
Rules define acceptable conduct.
Conduct must stay ethical.
Ethical standards guide teams.
Teams work on models.
Section 4
Models learn from data.
Data sources vary widely.
Widely sourced inputs need.
Need for privacy protection.
Protection keeps secrets safe.
Safe storage prevents leaks.
Leaks can ruin trust.
Trust is hard won.
Won by honest work.
Work demands constant review.
Section 5
Review processes catch flaws.
Flaws in logic hurt.
Hurt feelings matter too.
Too often systems fail.
Fail fast to learn.
Learn from past mistakes.
Mistakes teach us well.
Well learned lessons apply.
Apply changes to code.
Code evolves over time.
Section 6
Time brings new risks.
Risks require active monitoring.
Monitoring stops bad acts.
Acts of discrimination stop.
Stop harmful outcomes now.
Now we focus more.
More attention on safety.
Safety is our priority.
Priority drives our strategy.
Strategy includes human review.
Section 7
Human review adds value.
Value comes from insight.
Insight helps fix bugs.
Bugs in AI systems.
Systems need human input.
Input from diverse voices.
Voices from many lands.
Lands have unique needs.
Needs vary by culture.
Culture shapes how we.
Section 8
We commit to change.
Change requires bold steps.
Steps forward build progress.
Progress benefits everyone.
Everyone wins with ethics.
Ethics form our
